mapper.sql: (SELECT CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill_entry e0 WHERE e0.paren_id = stk.id AND (e0.del_flag IS NULL OR e0.del_flag != 1) ) THEN 'NONE' WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hc_doc_bill_ref r0 WHERE r0.src_bill_id = CAST(stk.id AS CHAR) AND r0.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND (r0.del_flag = 0 OR r0.del_flag IS NULL) ) THEN 'NONE' WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stk_io_bill_entry e WHERE e.paren_id = stk.id AND (e.del_flag IS NULL OR e.del_flag != 1) AND IFNULL(e.qty, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(r.ref_qty) FROM hc_doc_bill_ref r WHERE r.src_bill_id = CAST(stk.id AS CHAR) AND r.src_entry_id = CAST(e.id AS CHAR) AND r.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND (r.del_flag = 0 OR r.del_flag IS NULL) ), 0) < IFNULL(e.qty, 0) ) THEN 'FULL' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END)

select stk.id, stk.bill_no, stk.ref_bill_no, stk.suppler_id stkSupplierId, stk.bill_date, stk.warehouse_id, stk.department_id, stk.bill_status, stk.user_id stk_user_id, stk.bill_type, stk.del_flag, stk.tenant_id, stk.delete_by, stk.delete_time, stk.settlement_type, stk.audit_date, stk.create_by, stk.create_time, stk.update_by, stk.update_time, stk.remark,stk.del_person,stk.telephone,stk.total_amount,stk.invoice_number,stk.invoice_amount, stk.invoice_time,stk.pro_person,stk.return_reason,stk.is_month_init,stk.receipt_confirm_status,stk.audit_by, stk.d_apply_id,stk.wh_warehouse_apply_id,stk.wh_warehouse_apply_bill_no, stk.delivery_ref_warehouse_id,stk.delivery_ref_warehouse_name,stk.delivery_ref_supplier_id, stk.delivery_ref_supplier_name,stk.delivery_ref_dept_id,stk.delivery_ref_dept_name, s.id sId,s.code supplierCode,s.name supplierName, d.id dId,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName, tw.id twId,tw.code toWarehouseCode,tw.name toWarehouseName, u.user_id userId,u.nick_name nickName,u.user_name userName, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createrNickName,cu.user_name createrUserName, uu.nick_name updateByNickName,uu.user_name updateByUserName, AS doc_ref_status from stk_io_bill stk left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_warehouse tw on stk.department_id = tw.id and stk.bill_type = 501 left join sys_user u on stk.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on stk.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on stk.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user uu on stk.update_by = uu.user_id

select sum(stk.total_amount) totalAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (101) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalRkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (201) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalCkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (301) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalTkAmt, sum(case when stk.bill_type in (401) then stk.total_amount else 0 end) totalThAmt from stk_io_bill stk left join fd_supplier s on stk.suppler_id = s.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user u on stk.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_user au on stk.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on stk.create_by = cu.user_id
mapper.select:
where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 201 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.receipt_confirm_status = 0
order by stk.audit_date desc, stk.id desc limit 500
select count(1) from stk_io_bill stk where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 201 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.receipt_confirm_status = 0

select stk.department_id as departmentId, max(ifnull(d.name, '')) as departmentName, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -(ifnull(e.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(e.unit_price, e.price), 0)) else (ifnull(e.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(e.unit_price, e.price), 0)) end), 0) as outboundAmount, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -ifnull(e.qty, 0) else ifnull(e.qty, 0) end), 0) as outboundQuantity from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = stk.id and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.department_id is not null and stk.bill_date is not null and stk.bill_date >= concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01') and stk.bill_date < date_add(concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01'), interval 1 month) group by stk.department_id order by outboundAmount desc

select max(ifnull(nullif(trim(s.name), ''), '未维护供应商')) as supplierName, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(b.unit_price, 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(b.unit_price, 0)) end), 0) as totalAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_supplier s on s.id = ( case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end ) where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (101, 301) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and stk.bill_date >= concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01') and stk.bill_date < date_add(concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01'), interval 1 month) group by ( case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end ) having coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(b.unit_price, 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(b.unit_price, 0)) end), 0) > 0 order by totalAmt desc limit 10

select date_format(stk.bill_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, coalesce(sum(case when IFNULL(m.is_gz, '2') = '1' then (case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end) else 0 end), 0) as highValueAmt, coalesce(sum(case when IFNULL(m.is_gz, '2') != '1' then (case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end) else 0 end), 0) as lowValueAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (101, 301) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and stk.bill_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 19 day) and stk.bill_date <= curdate() group by date_format(stk.bill_date, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_format(stk.bill_date, '%Y-%m-%d') asc

select ifnull(max(nullif(trim(m.name), '')), concat('未命名物资', coalesce(b.material_id, 0))) as materialName, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end), 0) as totalAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and stk.bill_date >= concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01') and stk.bill_date < date_add(concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01'), interval 1 month) and b.material_id is not null group by b.material_id having coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end), 0) > 0 order by totalAmt desc limit 20

select case when m.finance_category_id is not null then ifnull(nullif(trim(max(fc.finance_category_name)), ''), concat('财务分类#', cast(m.finance_category_id as char))) else '未分类' end as financeCategoryName, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end), 0) as totalAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (101, 301) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and stk.bill_date >= concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01') and stk.bill_date < date_add(concat(date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m'), '-01'), interval 1 month) group by m.finance_category_id having coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) end), 0) > 0 order by totalAmt desc

select (select count(distinct stk.id) from stk_io_bill stk where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 201 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and date(stk.bill_date) = curdate()) as todayOutboundBillCount, (select count(distinct stk.id) from stk_io_bill stk where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 101 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and date(stk.bill_date) = curdate()) as todayInboundBillCount

select month(stk.bill_date) as monthNum, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 101 then (ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else 0 end), 0) as inboundAmt, coalesce(abs(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 301 then -(ifnull(b.qty, 0) * ifnull(ifnull(b.unit_price, b.price), 0)) else 0 end)), 0) as returnAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (101, 301) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and year(stk.bill_date) = year(curdate()) group by month(stk.bill_date) order by month(stk.bill_date) asc

select a.id, a.bill_no, a.ref_bill_no, a.suppler_id, a.bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.bill_status, a.user_id as stk_user_id, a.bill_type, a.del_flag, a.tenant_id, a.delete_by, a.delete_time, a.settlement_type, a.audit_date, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.d_apply_id, a.wh_warehouse_apply_id, a.wh_warehouse_apply_bill_no, a.delivery_ref_warehouse_id, a.delivery_ref_warehouse_name, a.delivery_ref_supplier_id, a.delivery_ref_supplier_name, a.delivery_ref_dept_id, a.delivery_ref_dept_name, a.del_person,a.telephone,a.total_amount,a.invoice_number,a.invoice_amount, a.invoice_time,a.pro_person,a.return_reason,a.is_month_init,a.receipt_confirm_status,a.audit_by, b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.bill_no as sub_bill_no, b.commodity_id as sub_commodity_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.material_name as sub_entry_material_name, b.material_speci as sub_entry_material_speci, b.material_model as sub_entry_material_model, b.material_factory_id as sub_entry_material_factory_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, b.delete_by as sub_delete_by, b.delete_time as sub_delete_time, b.remark as sub_remark, b.kc_no as sub_kc_no, b.stk_inventory_id as sub_stk_inventory_id, b.dep_inventory_id as sub_dep_inventory_id, b.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, b.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, b.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, b.suppler_id as sub_suppler_id, b.settlement_type as sub_settlement_type, b.wh_apply_entry_id as sub_wh_apply_entry_id, b.delivery_line_sign as sub_delivery_line_sign, b.delivery_line_qty_cap as sub_delivery_line_qty_cap, b.fixed_package_barcode as sub_fixed_package_barcode, b.warehouse_id_str as sub_warehouse_id_str, b.supplier_id_str as sub_supplier_id_str, b.department_id_str as sub_department_id_str, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createrNickName,cu.user_name createrUserName,a.audit_by, wh.id as wId, wh.code as warehouseCode, wh.name as warehouseName, d.id as dId, d.code as departmentCode, d.name as departmentName, op.user_id as userId, op.nick_name as nickName, op.user_name as userName, bill_sup.id as sId, bill_sup.code as supplierCode, bill_sup.name as supplierName, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci, m.model, m.register_no, m.supplier_id, m.factory_id AS mat_factory_id, m.unit_id AS m_unit_id, m.finance_category_id, m.storeroom_id, u.unit_id AS u_unit_id, u.unit_code as u_code, u.unit_name as u_name, f.factory_id AS f_factory_id, f.factory_code as f_code, f.factory_name as f_name, wc.warehouse_category_id as wid, wc.warehouse_category_code as wc_code, wc.warehouse_category_name as wc_name, fc.finance_category_id, fc.finance_category_code as fc_code, fc.finance_category_name as fc_name, s.id as sid, s.code as supplier_code, s.name as supplier_name from stk_io_bill a left join fd_warehouse wh on a.warehouse_id = wh.id left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join fd_supplier bill_sup on a.suppler_id = bill_sup.id left join sys_user op on a.user_id = op.user_id left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id left join fd_supplier s on m.supplier_id = s.id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id where a.id = #{id} and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} order by b.id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_bill
bill_no, ref_bill_no, suppler_id, bill_date, warehouse_id, department_id, bill_status, user_id, bill_type, del_flag, audit_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_person, telephone, total_amount, invoice_number, invoice_amount, invoice_time, pro_person, return_reason, is_month_init, receipt_confirm_status, audit_by, tenant_id, settlement_type, d_apply_id, wh_warehouse_apply_id, wh_warehouse_apply_bill_no, delivery_ref_warehouse_id, delivery_ref_warehouse_name, delivery_ref_supplier_id, delivery_ref_supplier_name, delivery_ref_dept_id, delivery_ref_dept_name,
#{billNo}, #{refBillNo}, #{supplerId}, #{billDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{billStatus}, #{userId}, #{billType}, #{delFlag}, #{auditDate}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delPerson}, #{telephone}, #{totalAmount}, #{invoiceNumber}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{invoiceTime}, #{proPerson}, #{returnReason}, #{isMonthInit}, #{receiptConfirmStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{scopedTenantId}, #{settlementType}, #{dApplyId}, #{whWarehouseApplyId}, #{whWarehouseApplyBillNo}, #{deliveryRefWarehouseId}, #{deliveryRefWarehouseName}, #{deliveryRefSupplierId}, #{deliveryRefSupplierName}, #{deliveryRefDeptId}, #{deliveryRefDeptName},
mapper.update:
update stk_io_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = #{deleteTime} where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and paren_id in
#{parenId}
update stk_io_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = #{deleteTime} where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.select: select id, paren_id, bill_no, commodity_id, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, remark, kc_no, stk_inventory_id, dep_inventory_id, warehouse_id, main_barcode, sub_barcode, suppler_id, settlement_type, wh_apply_entry_id, delivery_line_sign, delivery_line_qty_cap, fixed_package_barcode, warehouse_id_str, supplier_id_str, department_id_str, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_by, delete_time from stk_io_bill_entry where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1)
mapper.update:
update stk_io_bill_entry
paren_id = #{parenId}, bill_no = #{billNo}, commodity_id = #{commodityId}, material_id = #{materialId}, material_name = #{materialName}, material_speci = #{materialSpeci}, material_model = #{materialModel}, material_factory_id = #{materialFactoryId}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, qty = #{qty}, price = #{price}, amt = #{amt}, batch_no = #{batchNo}, batch_number = #{batchNumber}, begin_time = #{beginTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, remark = #{remark}, kc_no = #{kcNo}, stk_inventory_id = #{stkInventoryId}, dep_inventory_id = #{depInventoryId}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, main_barcode = #{mainBarcode}, sub_barcode = #{subBarcode}, suppler_id = #{supplerId}, settlement_type = #{settlementType}, wh_apply_entry_id = #{whApplyEntryId}, delivery_line_sign = #{deliveryLineSign}, delivery_line_qty_cap = #{deliveryLineQtyCap}, fixed_package_barcode = #{fixedPackageBarcode}, warehouse_id_str = #{warehouseIdStr}, supplier_id_str = #{supplierIdStr}, department_id_str = #{departmentIdStr}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = #{deleteTime},
where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1)
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_bill_entry(paren_id, bill_no, commodity_id, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, remark, kc_no, stk_inventory_id, dep_inventory_id, warehouse_id, main_barcode, sub_barcode, suppler_id, settlement_type, wh_apply_entry_id, delivery_line_sign, delivery_line_qty_cap, fixed_package_barcode, warehouse_id_str, supplier_id_str, department_id_str, tenant_id) values
(#{item.parenId}, #{item.billNo}, #{item.commodityId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.materialSpeci}, #{item.materialModel}, #{item.materialFactoryId}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.amt}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchNumber}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, COALESCE(#{item.delFlag}, 0), #{item.remark}, #{item.kcNo}, #{item.stkInventoryId}, #{item.depInventoryId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.mainBarcode}, #{item.subBarcode}, #{item.supplerId}, #{item.settlementType}, #{item.whApplyEntryId}, #{item.deliveryLineSign}, #{item.deliveryLineQtyCap}, #{item.fixedPackageBarcode}, #{item.warehouseIdStr}, #{item.supplierIdStr}, #{item.departmentIdStr}, #{scopedTenantId})
mapper.update: update stk_io_bill_entry set stk_inventory_id = #{stkInventoryId}, kc_no = #{stkInventoryId} where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update stk_io_bill_entry set stk_inventory_id = #{stkInventoryId}, dep_inventory_id = #{depInventoryId}, kc_no = #{depInventoryId} where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update stk_io_bill_entry set dep_inventory_id = #{depInventoryId}, kc_no = #{depInventoryId} where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update stk_io_bill_entry set suppler_id = #{supplerId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1)
mapper.select: select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 101 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 201 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 301 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 401 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_bill where bill_no like concat('%',#{billNo},'%') and bill_type = 501 and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select m.name materialName,sum(b.qty) historyQty from stk_io_bill a left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where a.bill_status = 2 and a.bill_type = '101' and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.create_time like concat('%',#{previousDateString},'%') GROUP BY m.name

select wCategoryName,sum(initAmount) initAmount,sum(beginAmount) beginAmount,sum(endAmount) endAmount, sum(beginAmount) - sum(endAmount) settleAmount, sum(profitAmount) profitAmount,sum(loseAmount) loseAmount, sum(initAmount)+sum(beginAmount)- sum(endAmount) settleRealityAmount from ( select wCategoryName, case when alias = '进项' then totalAmount else 0 end beginAmount, case when alias = '出项' then totalAmount else 0 end endAmount, case when alias = '盘盈' then totalAmount else 0 end profitAmount, case when alias = '盘亏' then totalAmount else 0 end loseAmount, case when alias = '期初' then totalAmount else 0 end initAmount from ( select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'进项' as alias from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (101) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'出项' as alias from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (201) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'盘盈' as alias from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount,'盘亏' as alias from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select DISTINCT wCategoryName,sum(totalAmount) totalAmount,'期初' as alias from ( select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.amt) totalAmount from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type in (101,401) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.bill_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name union select fw.warehouse_category_name wCategoryName, sum(b.stock_amount) totalAmount from stk_io_stocktaking a left join stk_io_stocktaking_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category fw on fw.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id where a.del_flag != 1 and a.stock_status = 2 and a.stock_type in (502) and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and a.stock_date >= #{beginDate} and a.stock_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY fw.warehouse_category_name ) qc where 1=1 GROUP BY wCategoryName ) wt ) t where 1=1 GROUP BY wCategoryName
select * from stk_io_bill where bill_date >= #{beginDate} and bill_date <= #{endDate} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.bill_no as sub_bill_no, b.commodity_id as sub_commodity_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.material_name as sub_entry_material_name, b.material_speci as sub_entry_material_speci, b.material_model as sub_entry_material_model, b.material_factory_id as sub_entry_material_factory_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.remark as sub_remark, b.kc_no as sub_kc_no, b.stk_inventory_id as sub_stk_inventory_id, b.dep_inventory_id as sub_dep_inventory_id, b.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, b.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, b.suppler_id as sub_suppler_id, b.delivery_line_sign as sub_delivery_line_sign, b.delivery_line_qty_cap as sub_delivery_line_qty_cap, b.fixed_package_barcode as sub_fixed_package_barcode, b.warehouse_id_str as sub_warehouse_id_str, b.supplier_id_str as sub_supplier_id_str, b.department_id_str as sub_department_id_str, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci, m.model, m.supplier_id, m.storeroom_id, m.factory_id, m.unit_id, m.finance_category_id, m.package_speci, m.register_no, u.unit_id, u.unit_code as u_code, u.unit_name as u_name, f.factory_id, f.factory_code as f_code, f.factory_name as f_name, fc.finance_category_id, fc.finance_category_code as fc_code, fc.finance_category_name as fc_name, wc.warehouse_category_id as wid, wc.warehouse_category_code as wc_code, wc.warehouse_category_name as wc_name, s.id as sid, s.code as supplier_code, s.name as supplier_name, w.id as wId, w.name as warehouseName, w.settlement_type as settlementType from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and b.del_flag != 1 left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_factory f on f.factory_id = m.factory_id left join fd_finance_category fc on fc.finance_category_id = m.finance_category_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on wc.warehouse_category_id = m.storeroom_id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = m.supplier_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_status = 2 and m.supplier_id = #{supplerId} and DATE(stk.audit_date) >= DATE(#{beginDate}) and DATE(stk.audit_date) <= DATE(#{endDate})
and ( (w.settlement_type = '1' and stk.bill_type = 101) or (w.settlement_type = '2' and stk.bill_type = 201) or (w.settlement_type = '3' and stk.bill_type = 201) or (w.settlement_type IS NULL and (stk.bill_type = 101 or stk.bill_type = 201)) )
and not exists ( select 1 from stk_io_bill settlement left join stk_io_bill_entry settlement_entry on settlement_entry.paren_id = settlement.id and settlement_entry.del_flag != 1 where settlement.del_flag != 1 and settlement.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and settlement.bill_type = 501 and settlement_entry.material_id = b.material_id and settlement_entry.batch_no = b.batch_no and settlement.bill_status = 2 ) order by stk.audit_date desc, stk.id desc, b.id desc

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.qty), 0) AS totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(b.amt), 0) AS totalAmt FROM stk_io_bill stk INNER JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id WHERE

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.qty), 0) AS totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(b.amt), 0) AS totalAmt FROM stk_io_bill stk INNER JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id WHERE

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.qty), 0) AS totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(b.amt), 0) AS totalAmt FROM stk_io_bill stk INNER JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id WHERE

SELECT stk.id, stk.bill_no billNo, stk.bill_date billDate, stk.warehouse_id warehouseId, stk.department_id departmentId, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, b.qty, b.unit_price unitPrice, b.amt, b.batch_no batchNo, b.batch_number batchNumber, b.begin_time beginTime, b.end_time endTime, w.name warehouseName, d.name departmentName, cu.user_name createrName, cu.nick_name createrNickName, au.user_name auditPersonName, au.nick_name auditNickName, stk.audit_date auditDate, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName FROM stk_io_bill stk LEFT JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN fd_department d ON stk.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN fd_warehouse w ON stk.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN fd_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON stk.create_by = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON stk.audit_by = au.user_id LEFT JOIN fd_factory f ON m.factory_id = f.factory_id LEFT JOIN fd_supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE ORDER BY stk.bill_date DESC, stk.id DESC, b.id DESC

SELECT m.id materialId, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, d.name departmentName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, AVG(b.unit_price) unitPrice, SUM(b.qty) totalQty, SUM(b.amt) totalAmt, MAX(m.is_billing) as isBilling, m.register_no registerNo, m.period_date periodDate, w.name warehouseName, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName FROM stk_io_bill stk LEFT JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN fd_department d ON stk.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN fd_warehouse w ON stk.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN fd_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN fd_factory f ON m.factory_id = f.factory_id LEFT JOIN fd_supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE GROUP BY m.id, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, m.register_no, m.period_date, w.name, f.factory_name, s.name, d.id, d.name ORDER BY totalAmt DESC

SELECT m.id materialId, m.code materialCode, m.name materialName, m.speci materialSpeci, m.model materialModel, u.unit_name unitName, AVG(b.unit_price) unitPrice, SUM(b.qty) totalQty, SUM(b.amt) totalAmt, ROUND((SUM(b.amt) / (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amt), 1) FROM stk_io_bill_entry entry INNER JOIN stk_io_bill bill ON bill.id = entry.paren_id WHERE bill.del_flag != 1 AND bill.bill_status = 2 AND bill.bill_type = 201 AND bill.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} AND entry.del_flag != 1 AND bill.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND bill.department_id = #{departmentId} AND bill.bill_date >= #{beginDate} AND bill.bill_date <= #{endDate} )) * 100, 2) as percentage, f.factory_name factoryName, s.name supplierName FROM stk_io_bill stk LEFT JOIN stk_io_bill_entry b ON b.paren_id = stk.id AND b.del_flag != 1 LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON b.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN fd_unit u ON m.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN fd_factory f ON m.factory_id = f.factory_id LEFT JOIN fd_supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id WHERE GROUP BY m.id, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name, f.factory_name, s.name ORDER BY totalAmt DESC

SELECT vsadj.warehouse_id ,vsadj.warehouse_code ,vsadj.warehouse_name ,vsadj.storeroom_id ,vsadj.warehouse_category_code ,vsadj.warehouse_category_name ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} then vsadj.jc_qty else 0 end) as qc_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} then vsadj.jc_amt else 0 end) as qc_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('QC') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as qc_import_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('QC') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as qc_import_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('RK') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as rk_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('RK') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as rk_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('CK') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as ck_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('CK') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as ck_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBR') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as dbr_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBR') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as dbr_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBC') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as dbc_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('DBC') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as dbc_amt ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('PD') then vsadj.io_qty else 0 end) as pd_qty ,sum(case when vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and vsadj.io_type in ('PD') then vsadj.io_amt else 0 end) as pd_amt ,sum(vsadj.jc_qty) as jc_qty ,sum(vsadj.jc_amt) as jc_amt FROM view_stock_all_detail_jxc vsadj WHERE 1 = 1 and vsadj.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and vsadj.audit_date <= #{endDate} AND vsadj.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND vsadj.storeroom_id = #{warehouseCategoryId} GROUP BY vsadj.warehouse_id ,vsadj.warehouse_code ,vsadj.warehouse_name ,vsadj.storeroom_id ,vsadj.warehouse_category_code ,vsadj.warehouse_category_name

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(vsadj.suppler_name), ''), '未维护供应商') AS supplierName, SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} THEN vsadj.jc_amt ELSE 0 END) AS lastMonthBalance, SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} AND vsadj.io_type = 'RK' THEN vsadj.io_amt ELSE 0 END) AS monthInAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} AND vsadj.io_type = 'CK' THEN vsadj.io_amt ELSE 0 END) AS monthOutAmount, SUM(vsadj.jc_amt) AS spdStockAmount FROM view_stock_all_detail_jxc vsadj LEFT JOIN fd_supplier fs ON fs.id = vsadj.suppler_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND vsadj.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} AND vsadj.audit_date <= #{endDate} AND vsadj.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND vsadj.suppler_id = #{supplerId}
AND ( COALESCE(vsadj.suppler_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(fs.name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(fs.code, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(fs.referred_code, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(vsadj.suppler_name), ''), '未维护供应商')
HAVING NOT ( SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date < #{beginDate} THEN vsadj.jc_amt ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} AND vsadj.io_type = 'RK' THEN vsadj.io_amt ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN vsadj.audit_date >= #{beginDate} AND vsadj.io_type = 'CK' THEN vsadj.io_amt ELSE 0 END) = 0 )
ORDER BY spdStockAmount DESC

select s.id as supplierId, s.code as supplierCode, s.name as supplierName, count(1) as recordCount from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = stk.id and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_supplier s on s.id = stk.suppler_id where stk.del_flag != 1 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_type = 101 and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.material_id = #{materialId} group by s.id, s.code, s.name order by s.code asc, s.name asc

select case when m.storeroom_id in (11, 12) then '材料' when m.storeroom_id = 13 then '试剂' else '未识别分类' end as materialKind, (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) as supplierId, IFNULL(MAX(s.name), IFNULL(MAX(sf.name), '未指定供应商')) as supplierName, ROUND(SUM( (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0) ), 2) as wholesaleAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) left join fd_supplier sf on sf.id = stk.suppler_id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id left join fd_warehouse w on stk.warehouse_id = w.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId} and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%')) and m.is_procure = #{materialIsProcure}
group by case when m.storeroom_id in (11, 12) then '材料' when m.storeroom_id = 13 then '试剂' else '未识别分类' end, (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) having ABS(SUM( (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0) )) > 0.0000001

select stk.department_id as departmentId, COALESCE(MAX(TRIM(d.name)), '未指定科室') as departmentName, ROUND(SUM( case when m.storeroom_id = 12 then (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0) else 0 end ), 2) as plainConsumablesAmt, ROUND(SUM( case when m.storeroom_id = 11 then (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0) else 0 end ), 2) as highValueConsumablesAmt, ROUND(SUM( case when m.storeroom_id = 13 then (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0) else 0 end ), 2) as reagentAmt from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join fd_department d on stk.department_id = d.id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId} and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and (m.name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.code like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%') or m.referred_name like concat('%', #{materialNameLike}, '%')) and m.is_procure = #{materialIsProcure}
group by stk.department_id having ABS(IFNULL(plainConsumablesAmt, 0)) + ABS(IFNULL(highValueConsumablesAmt, 0)) + ABS(IFNULL(reagentAmt, 0)) > 0.0000001
mapper.sql: (case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -1 else 1 end) * IFNULL(b.amt, IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL( IFNULL(b.unit_price, CASE WHEN b.amt IS NOT NULL AND b.qty IS NOT NULL AND b.qty <> 0 THEN ROUND(b.amt / b.qty, 6) ELSE NULL END), 0))
mapper.select:
select count(1) from ( select 1 from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on m.id = b.material_id left join fd_material_category mc on mc.material_category_id = m.material_category_id and mc.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id and (mc.del_flag is null or mc.del_flag != 1) left join fd_supplier s_line on s_line.id = (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else null end) left join fd_supplier s_bill on s_bill.id = stk.suppler_id left join fd_department d on d.id = stk.department_id left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = stk.warehouse_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId}
and (w.code like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.referred_name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%'))
and ((s_line.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')) or (s_bill.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')))
and (d.code like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.referred_name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%'))
group by DATE_FORMAT(stk.audit_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(mc.material_category_name), ''), '未识别分类'), (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) ) g

select ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(agg.amount), 0), 2) from ( select ROUND(SUM(), 2) as amount from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on m.id = b.material_id left join fd_material_category mc on mc.material_category_id = m.material_category_id and mc.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id and (mc.del_flag is null or mc.del_flag != 1) left join fd_supplier s_line on s_line.id = (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else null end) left join fd_supplier s_bill on s_bill.id = stk.suppler_id left join fd_department d on d.id = stk.department_id left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = stk.warehouse_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId}
and (w.code like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.referred_name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%'))
and ((s_line.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')) or (s_bill.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')))
and (d.code like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.referred_name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%'))
group by DATE_FORMAT(stk.audit_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(mc.material_category_name), ''), '未识别分类'), (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) ) agg

select count(1) from ( select 1 from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on m.id = b.material_id left join fd_material_category mc on mc.material_category_id = m.material_category_id and mc.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id and (mc.del_flag is null or mc.del_flag != 1) left join fd_department d on d.id = stk.department_id left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = stk.warehouse_id left join fd_supplier s_line on s_line.id = (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else null end) left join fd_supplier s_bill on s_bill.id = stk.suppler_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId}
and (w.code like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.referred_name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%'))
and ((s_line.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')) or (s_bill.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')))
and (d.code like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.referred_name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%'))
group by DATE_FORMAT(stk.audit_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(mc.material_category_name), ''), '未识别分类'), stk.department_id, IFNULL(m.is_gz, '2') ) g

select ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(agg.amount), 0), 2) from ( select ROUND(SUM(), 2) as amount from stk_io_bill stk inner join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) inner join fd_material m on m.id = b.material_id left join fd_material_category mc on mc.material_category_id = m.material_category_id and mc.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id and (mc.del_flag is null or mc.del_flag != 1) left join fd_department d on d.id = stk.department_id left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = stk.warehouse_id left join fd_supplier s_line on s_line.id = (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else null end) left join fd_supplier s_bill on s_bill.id = stk.suppler_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and stk.department_id = #{departmentId} and (case when b.suppler_id is not null and trim(b.suppler_id) <> '' then cast(trim(b.suppler_id) as unsigned) else stk.suppler_id end) = #{supplerId}
and (w.code like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%') or w.referred_name like concat('%', #{warehouseKeyword}, '%'))
and ((s_line.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_line.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')) or (s_bill.code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or s_bill.referred_code like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%')))
and (d.code like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') or d.referred_name like concat('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%'))
group by DATE_FORMAT(stk.audit_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(mc.material_category_name), ''), '未识别分类'), stk.department_id, IFNULL(m.is_gz, '2') ) agg

select MONTH(stk.audit_date) as monthNum, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -IFNULL(b.qty, 0) else IFNULL(b.qty, 0) end), 0) as receiveQty, coalesce(sum(case when stk.bill_type = 401 then -(IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL(b.unit_price, 0)) else (IFNULL(b.qty, 0) * IFNULL(b.unit_price, 0)) end), 0) as receiveAmt from stk_io_bill stk left join stk_io_bill_entry b on b.paren_id = stk.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type in (201, 401) and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.audit_date >= #{beginDate} and stk.audit_date <= #{endDate} group by MONTH(stk.audit_date)
mapper.update: update stk_io_bill_entry e inner join stk_io_bill b on b.id = e.paren_id set e.wh_apply_entry_id = null, e.update_by = #{updateBy}, e.update_time = now() where b.wh_warehouse_apply_id = #{whApplyId} and b.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and b.bill_type = 201 and b.bill_status = 1 and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null)

update stk_io_bill set wh_warehouse_apply_id = null, wh_warehouse_apply_bill_no = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where wh_warehouse_apply_id = #{whApplyId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and bill_type = 201 and bill_status = 1 and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
